deep_dive.title: Welfarist Control Design -- How to fulfill the societal mandate in multi-agent control?
deep_dive.abstract: At the core of most socio-technical systems lies a scarce resource that is allocated among agents: highway lanes, public transit, road space, water rights, energy access, grid capacity, user attention, pollution rights, etc. With further automation of the underlying allocation processes, control engineers are increasingly tasked to make decisive assumptions regarding what society wants. In practice to date, design choices are largely driven by industry norms and conventions rather than a result of conscientiously responsible and ethical design. In this paper, we look at tools available to control engineers to design systems in a more principled manner in order to match the societal mandate. We consider three control design paradigms: online feedback optimization, control of Markov decision processes, and model predictive control. Beginning with aggregating individual agents' preferences into control design objectives, subsequently ensuring and certifying the fulfillment of those specifications, we argue that the feedback nature of control systems enables appropriate allocation of the shared resources in ways hitherto unparalleled.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: addresses ethical AI, fairness, and societal mandate in multi-agent control systems
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 探讨多智能体控制中的伦理AI、公平性和社会使命，与算法治理相关
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 探讨多智能体控制中的伦理AI、公平性和社会使命，与算法治理相关
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 探讨多智能体控制中的伦理AI、公平性和社会使命，与算法治理相关
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Discusses principled design paradigms for multi-agent control systems to align with societal values, covering fairness, transparency, and accountability.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文指出当前多智能体控制系统的设计大多基于行业惯例而非负责任的伦理设计。为满足社会使命，提出了三种控制设计范式：基于社会福利的、基于权利的以及基于协商的设计，并讨论了如何将公平、透明和问责等伦理原则嵌入控制算法。为算法治理和AI伦理提供了控制工程视角的理论框架和实践指南。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文指出当前多智能体控制系统的设计大多基于行业惯例而非负责任的伦理设计。为满足社会使命，提出了三种控制设计范式：基于社会福利的、基于权利的以及基于协商的设计，并讨论了如何将公平、透明和问责等伦理原则嵌入控制算法。为算法治理和AI伦理提供了控制工程视角的理论框架和实践指南。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查询关于算法治理的文章, especially work that connects or combines: algorithm governance principles and frameworks; fairness in algorithmic decision making; transparency of algorithms and models; accountability for algorithmic outcomes; ethical considerations in artificial intelligence; detecting bias in machine learning models; challenges and solutions in algorithm governance; impact of algorithm governance on society; best practices for implementing algorithm governance.

deep_dive.title: On-board Remote-Sensing Foundation Models for Unsupervised Change Detection of Disaster Events
deep_dive.abstract: Remote Sensing Foundation Models (RSFMs) have emerged as a powerful alternative to supervised models for Earth Observation, allowing satellites to autonomously trigger high-resolution captures or adjust tasking parameters upon detecting an anomaly, thereby maximizing the utility of the mission's limited power and computational resources. RSFMs are versatile, unified encoders that optimize onboard storage for multiple orbital applications while ensuring high-fidelity feature extraction. In particular, unsupervised change detection with RSFMs offers a well-informed and transformative path for disaster monitoring without expensive labels. In this paper, we present a novel unsupervised detection method based on ResNet (RSFM) + FPN which identifies a wide spectrum of anomalies by detecting subtle semantic shifts in the latent space between successive orbital passes. By relying on an untrained FPN architecture and its intrinsic priors, the system achieves efficient image-level generation and higher resolution mapping with minimal effort (training-free) compared to previous proposals (patch-based, trained). And by replacing tailored models with RSFMs, we can achieve comparable results through an approach that eliminates the need for bespoke training and extensive development effort and adds customization, while ensuring high-performance generalization across diverse terrains and sensors.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: on-board remote-sensing foundation models for unsupervised change detection of disaster events; directly applicable to flood damage assessment and risk monitoring
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 机载遥感基础模型用于灾害事件的无监督变化检测，可直接用于洪水监测和风险评估
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 机载遥感基础模型用于灾害事件的无监督变化检测，可直接用于洪水监测和风险评估
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 机载遥感基础模型用于灾害事件的无监督变化检测，可直接用于洪水监测和风险评估
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an unsupervised change detection method using ResNet (RSFM) + FPN for disaster monitoring, enabling autonomous satellite detection of anomalies for flood events without labeled data.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对灾害监测中标注数据稀缺和卫星自主能力不足的问题，提出基于遥感基础模型（ResNet+FPN）的无监督变化检测方法。该方法利用预训练基础模型提取高保真特征，并结合特征金字塔网络进行多尺度变化检测，使卫星能自主识别洪水等异常事件。实验表明，该方法在无需标签的情况下有效检测地表变化，为城市洪水灾害的快速评估和应急响应提供了高效、经济的解决方案，显著提升了卫星在轨监测的实时性和自主性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对灾害监测中标注数据稀缺和卫星自主能力不足的问题，提出基于遥感基础模型（ResNet+FPN）的无监督变化检测方法。该方法利用预训练基础模型提取高保真特征，并结合特征金字塔网络进行多尺度变化检测，使卫星能自主识别洪水等异常事件。实验表明，该方法在无需标签的情况下有效检测地表变化，为城市洪水灾害的快速评估和应急响应提供了高效、经济的解决方案，显著提升了卫星在轨监测的实时性和自主性。

quick_skim.title: Otter Weather: Skillful and Computationally Efficient Medium-Range Weather Forecasting
quick_skim.abstract: State-of-the-art medium-range AI weather models can outperform traditional Numerical Weather Prediction (NWP) but require massive training budgets. This restricts usage for under-resourced groups and severely limits fast model iteration. Here we develop Otter Weather, a highly efficient spatiotemporal forecasting model designed to democratise high-performance weather prediction with AI. Evaluated on ERA5 reanalysis data at 1.5° resolution using standard WeatherBench protocols, the Otter family significantly advances the skill-compute Pareto frontier. The deterministic version outperforms the best NWP baseline by 9.6% at a 24-hour lead time while requiring fewer than 3.5 A100-days for training. It provides a 2x efficiency gain over lightweight AI models and a 100-fold reduction in compute compared to resource-intensive frontier architectures. We extend these efficiency gains into probabilistic forecasting by training via the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS). Scaling to a larger architecture, Otter-XL achieves a 9.7% CRPS improvement over the IFS ENS baseline. This yields an almost two-fold increase in predictive skill over comparable lightweight models at similar compute budgets. Otter-XL also outperforms frontier architectures like GenCast by over 2%, while using an order of magnitude less compute. Finally, Otter is applied out-of-the-box to a complex acoustic scattering PDE task where it outperforms a state-of-the-art foundation modelling approach, suggesting that the advances made here might apply across a range of scientific domains.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: efficient medium-range weather forecasting model Otter Weather; can support flood risk assessment
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 高效中期天气预报模型Otter Weather，可用于洪水风险评估
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 高效中期天气预报模型Otter Weather，可用于洪水风险评估
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 高效中期天气预报模型Otter Weather，可用于洪水风险评估
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Otter Weather is a computationally efficient AI weather model that outperforms NWP baselines with lower training cost; directly applicable to flood risk forecasting and early warning.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有AI天气预报模型训练成本高昂的问题，本文开发了Otter Weather模型，在1.5°分辨率ERA5数据上取得了优于最佳NWP基线9.6%的24小时预报技能，且训练时间不足3.5 A100天。该模型在保持高技能的同时大幅降低了计算需求，推动了天气预报的民主化，可有效支持城市洪水预警和风险决策，特别是在资源受限场景下具有重要应用价值。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有AI天气预报模型训练成本高昂的问题，本文开发了Otter Weather模型，在1.5°分辨率ERA5数据上取得了优于最佳NWP基线9.6%的24小时预报技能，且训练时间不足3.5 A100天。该模型在保持高技能的同时大幅降低了计算需求，推动了天气预报的民主化，可有效支持城市洪水预警和风险决策，特别是在资源受限场景下具有重要应用价值。

quick_skim.title: What's in an Earth Embedding? An Explainability Analysis of Location Encoders
quick_skim.abstract: Geographic implicit neural representations (INRs) learn to map any coordinate on Earth to a location embedding, implicitly encoding geospatial data into the weights of a neural network. Location embeddings are widely used off the shelf as general-purpose geospatial representations, yet users lack principled tools to audit what geographic or semantic information these embeddings capture. In this work, we analyze the information content of geographic INRs through their location embeddings. We decompose these embeddings into human-interpretable features$\unicode{x2014}$namely, (i) sparse latent concepts, (ii) natural language concepts, and (iii) visual features. The latent concept embeddings are learned using sparse autoencoders. To recover natural language concepts, we apply sparse linear concept embeddings (SpLiCE) over a predefined geospatial dictionary. Finally, visual features are extracted using saliency maps derived from CLIP Surgery. We show that location embeddings can be decomposed into human-interpretable representations while retaining high reconstruction capability, revealing interpretable geographic structures such as forests, deserts, and urban features. Across methods, sparse decompositions expose systematic differences in encoded information, ranging from urban structures to broader biome and climate signals, and pretraining-space saliency maps further highlight complementary features such as roads and landmarks. We hope this work provides a first step toward interpretable geospatial representations.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: explainability analysis of location encoders for algorithm transparency
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 位置编码器的可解释性分析，支持算法透明度
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 位置编码器的可解释性分析，支持算法透明度
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 位置编码器的可解释性分析，支持算法透明度
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Analyzes geographic location embeddings to extract interpretable features using sparse autoencoders and natural language concepts, supporting transparency in geospatial AI systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文分析了地理隐式神经表示中的位置嵌入，通过稀疏自编码器和语言模型将其分解为稀疏潜在概念、自然语言概念和视觉特征，为地理空间AI系统提供可解释性工具，有助于算法治理中的透明度评估。

quick_skim.title: Uncertainty quantification via conformal prediction in data assimilation
quick_skim.abstract: Quantifying the evolution of uncertainty is critical to both probabilistic forecasting and data assimilation in numerical weather prediction. In this study, we investigate the applicability of conformal prediction (CP), a recent machine learning (ML) method, to quantify uncertainty in a controlled, idealized setting. We use the one dimensional modified shallow water model, designed to mimic the convective process. CP provides a set of possible outcomes with a chosen confidence level. Here, we compare and evaluate the average empirical coverage, the average interval length, miss low, miss high and average interval score loss (AISL) for three variants of CP, namely a) Standard CP, b) Normalized CP and c) Conformalized Quantile Regression. We further compare these CP-based uncertainty estimates with traditional ensemble-based measures such as standard deviation intervals and ensemble spread. In addition, we investigate the integration of CP-derived uncertainty within the data assimilation cycle through CP perturbations. Our results highlight the strengths and limitations of each approach, providing insight into the effectiveness of CP to complement common ensemble-based uncertainty quantification in simplified atmospheric models.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uncertainty quantification via conformal prediction for data assimilation; transferable to urban flood risk assessment
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过保形预测进行数据同化的不确定性量化，可转移至城市洪水风险评估
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过保形预测进行数据同化的不确定性量化，可转移至城市洪水风险评估
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过保形预测进行数据同化的不确定性量化，可转移至城市洪水风险评估
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Applies conformal prediction to quantify uncertainty in data assimilation using a shallow water model; method is transferable to urban flood risk assessment and improves probabilistic predictions.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对数值天气预报中不确定量化的重要性和现有方法的局限性，提出将保形预测这一机器学习方法用于数据同化过程，通过一维修正浅水模型进行验证。评估了标准CP、归一化CP和保形分位数回归三种变体的性能，结果表明保形预测能提供可靠的概率预测区间。该方法计算高效，可推广至城市洪水风险预测中的不确定性量化，为相关决策提供更准确的概率信息。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对数值天气预报中不确定量化的重要性和现有方法的局限性，提出将保形预测这一机器学习方法用于数据同化过程，通过一维修正浅水模型进行验证。评估了标准CP、归一化CP和保形分位数回归三种变体的性能，结果表明保形预测能提供可靠的概率预测区间。该方法计算高效，可推广至城市洪水风险预测中的不确定性量化，为相关决策提供更准确的概率信息。
